description: CompositionRed T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round neck, and a batman graphic on the front FitRegularWash CareHand wash with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsDisplay your belief in earning justice the rightful way with this batman T-shirt. Energetic as the legendary character himself, this T-shirt transports you back to the times when you only saw the millionaire-turned-batman Bruce Wayne in comic books. Pair it with denims and arty canvas shoes for stylish comfort.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
